title: Prof. Wilhelm Hankel: Does the Euro have a chance of surviving?
description:
Does the Euro have a chance of surviving?
Prof. Wilhelm Hankel, former head of the Money Department and of the German banking supervision of the Economic ministry, former chief economist of the Kreditanstalt für Wiederaufbau (KfW)

International Schiller Institute conference:
A New Paradigm For The Survival of Civilization
Flörsheim, Germany • November 24-25, 2012
http://schiller-institut.com
